name: ARE 5.0 Practice Management: Scenario & Judgment
recallStyle: Reason through realistic practice scenarios to the right action and the principle behind it; the examiner grades your reasoning against source-grounded checkpoints.

meta.sources: NCARB Model Law & Model Regulations + Model Rules of Conduct + ARE 5.0 Guidelines (PcM); public delivery-method & business-structure references. Short verbatim excerpts cited per checkpoint for educational grounding.
